reason_for_decision: The article explains PTZ and EO/IR in plain language, distinguishes verification from search, and gives enough operational limits and decision guidance to pass as a Foundation article without revision.
strengths: The article clearly separates PTZ movement control from EO/IR sensing roles, which prevents beginner confusion.
It explains why these systems are usually confirmation and tracking layers instead of first-search sensors.
The performance section gives practical judgment on zoom, stabilization, line of sight, and workflow rather than repeating brochure claims.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, technically grounded, and useful enough to pass without revision.
